# PicAlive

> PicAlive is a free iOS app (iPhone and iPad) that turns any still photo into a realistic, AI-generated moving video. Pick a photo, tap once, and faces smile, hair sways, and the moment comes alive — no prompts, editing skills, or account required. Free to try; PicAlive PRO unlocks unlimited, watermark-free videos with priority processing.

PicAlive is part of the AI Photo Journey family of AI creativity apps (https://ai-photo-journey.com).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://picalive.app/): What PicAlive does and why people love it
- [Features](https://picalive.app/features): Overview of everything the app can do
- [Photo to Video AI](https://picalive.app/features/photo-to-video): Turn any picture into a moving video
- [Animate Old Photos](https://picalive.app/features/animate-old-photos): Bring old family portraits back to life
- [Save & Share](https://picalive.app/features/save-and-share): Export, history, and sharing
- [How It Works](https://picalive.app/how-it-works): The one-tap flow, step by step
- [Examples](https://picalive.app/examples): What people bring to life
- [Animation Ideas](https://picalive.app/animation-ideas): Inspiration for what to animate first
- [FAQ](https://picalive.app/faq): Common questions, PRO, privacy, and billing
- [About](https://picalive.app/about): The team and the AI Photo Journey family

## Facts

- Platform: iOS (iPhone and iPad), download at https://apps.apple.com/us/app/image-to-video-picalive/id6757533997
- No account or login required
- Free tier with watermark; PRO removes watermark and limits
- Sibling apps: FxAI (https://fxai.app), Photix (https://photix.app), Videx (https://videx.app), SwapTo (https://swapto.app)
